# LLMnesia

Canonical: https://llmnesia.com
Product: Local-first browser extension for searching AI chat history across platforms.
Primary action: Install Chrome extension.
Install URL: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/llmnesia/leekfgbdojiaabifbjbbgiiclannjdkf

Core pages:
- https://llmnesia.com/
- https://llmnesia.com/blog
- https://llmnesia.com/compare
- https://llmnesia.com/use-cases
- https://llmnesia.com/privacy-policy
- https://llmnesia.com/feed.xml
- https://llmnesia.com/sitemap.xml
- https://llmnesia.com/docs/llms-full.txt

Summary:
LLMnesia indexes supported AI chats locally in the browser and lets users search old prompts, answers, and decisions.
It does not require cloud sync for core search functionality.
